title: Generic Questions and Thinking about Rebuild series
display_title: Generic Questions and Thinking about Rebuild series
wikitext:
[]: Generic Questions and Thinking about Rebuild series Post by airman4 » Fri May 23, 2014 1:37 pm Hi If this thread is an error then erase please I dont know where to put those thinking so i decided to create a thread where you can put generic thoughts and all about the whole rebuild series. I'll start with that thinking (if i'm wrong then i'm wrong) 1.11 is the sign of the beginning , where the whole thing begins , story is set up etc We see kaworu already and Seele at the end.Nice intro 2.22 is the sign of the Man , manhood or manlier stuff It's very actionny and from a point of view story it's easy to follow, Shinji with vigor tries to save Rei (despite we know the ending following in 3.33 ) We can also see gendo more humanized and more centered about him Mari and Asuka are saved in the end by Shinji 3.33 is the sign of the Woman Misato , ritsuko , Rei III save Shinji from shit , the movie is by a lot of fans impossible to get (lol) Mari is by far the best pilot in the movie , save the shit from 4NI and also manages to keep an intact eva 08 in the end (wtf the teaser of 4.0 with the eva 08 merged) She saves the world therefore. A complex begins between Shinji and Rei III in the neonerv quarters xd 4.0 what sign it will be ? the ending ? the child ? What do you think ? Sorry if it have been discuessed before , but i didnt managed to find it

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri May 23, 2014 1:55 pm ^ Oh excellent idea, I've been wanting to do this for some time. 1.0 was Misato letting Shinji know that he was not alone. 2.0 was Kaworu stopping Shinji from advancing. 3.0 was Kozo telling him he can't fix it. 4.0 will probably be Asuka letting him know that he can Rebuild. The overall theme for this film series is Forgiveness.

[]: Post by Dima » Fri May 23, 2014 2:20 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: The overall theme for this film series is Forgiveness.

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 23, 2014 2:21 pm I see it as 1.0 being about how you think you are alone, but are (not), 2.0 about how you think you can advance but can (not), and 3.0 about how you think you can redo, but can (not). I always saw it as what Shinji thinks at the beginning and at the end of each movie.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Fri May 23, 2014 2:31 pm Seems a bit like forcedly reaching for patterns to me.

[]: Post by Sachi » Fri May 23, 2014 2:40 pm Related thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15031/Patriarchy-in-Ha-vs-Feminism-in-Q/

[]: Post by Kendrix » Fri May 23, 2014 2:50 pm Something that instantly makes these discussions about how "2.22 is sexist because someone with boobs touches kitchen utensils" instantly hilarious is that they're only doing so because they are just repaying Shinji's favors . Of cooking for them. Shinji simply happens to be the main character and have the plot centered around him in either of the movies; In Q, he's just less sucessfull/being kept out of battle situations at first. Mari and Asuka are also, among other things, adults .

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri May 23, 2014 2:56 pm Dima wrote: I would like this direction.

[]: Post by airman4 » Sat May 24, 2014 5:02 am Sachi wrote: Related thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15031/Patriarchy-in-Ha-vs-Feminism-in-Q/

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat May 24, 2014 12:31 pm ^ What do you mean Good Sir?

[]: Post by airman4 » Sat May 24, 2014 1:00 pm Sorry my english , restoring the world as kaworu implied in 3.33

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat May 24, 2014 2:59 pm Oh okay and don't worry about your English, just take your time and keep sentences short, you are doing fine Good Sir The world can be restored like Kaworu said but I think one of the purposes of Rebuild is to show that the simple path is the false path, unless they show that using the spears together requires some tremendous amount of self sacrifice, I don't think they'll use it. Rebuild is all about rebuilding, a magical fix it all is not rebuilding. Another reason I believe Rebuild is sequel is because well, it's called Rebuild for a reason. I don't think Instrumentality was nearly as successful as we hoped it was, one day of group therapy, even if it's the best in the Universe, will not help you, it may get you to realize that you're fucked up, but Shinji already knew that beforehand. Multiple group therapy sessions though? That would help tremendously, especially if each one was focusing on a different problem.

[]: Post by Ray » Sat May 24, 2014 3:06 pm Well. . . my thoughts? If 2.0 was a party 3.0 was the hangover. Not something you want, but what you desperately need to bring you back to reality. 3.0 depressed me to no end. . . everyone Shinji knows and loves has all but abandoned him. The girls he loved are either dead or too old for him. He tries to make it right, and ends up proving everyone who hates him right. Ugh. . . sad movie is sad. . .Anno put me through the ringer. . .

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat May 24, 2014 3:13 pm ^ Awww bro, there there, hope still exists, have faith.

[]: Post by Ray » Sat May 24, 2014 3:16 pm I'm not the one who needs a hug. . . its poor Shinji. DAMN YOU ANNO! WHAT HAVE YOU DONE TO MY Misato!? It was heartbreaking to see HER of all people abandon Shinji. But I guess 14 years of of unresolved hate and lack of closure change a person. . .

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat May 24, 2014 3:20 pm ^ Don't worry, Shinji will get his hug and then some And that wasn't a hug, this is a hug Misato's just upset, that's all, she'll eventually forgive him and then they'll Rebuild.

[]: Post by Ray » Sun May 25, 2014 7:02 pm If everything about Q was the same except for the 14 year skip. . .I'd probably be a lot more optimistic about Final.

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun May 25, 2014 7:06 pm ^ Well they do need something to Rebuild from

[]: Post by robersora » Mon May 26, 2014 3:13 am kuribo-04 wrote: I see it as 1.0 being about how you think you are alone, but are (not), 2.0 about how you think you can advance but can (not), and 3.0 about how you think you can redo, but can (not). I always saw it as what Shinji thinks at the beginning and at the end of each movie.

[]: Post by airman4 » Mon May 26, 2014 5:22 am Ray wrote: If everything about Q was the same except for the 14 year skip. . .I'd probably be a lot more optimistic about Final.
